code_dossier.name: SendSMSRequest.java
code_dossier.description: SMS sending request data transfer object (DTO) used to encapsulate the parameters required for sending SMS messages through third-party SMS services

data.detailed_description:
SendSMSRequest is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) class located in the third-party API module, specifically designed to encapsulate SMS sending request parameters. This class serves as the contract between the internal system and third-party SMS service providers.

The class uses Lombok's @Data annotation to automatically generate boilerplate code including getters, setters, toString(), equals(), hashCode(), and a default constructor. This follows the common Java DTO pattern for reducing code verbosity while maintaining full JavaBean functionality.

The three fields represent the essential components for sending an SMS:
1. `phone` - The recipient's phone number for SMS delivery
2. `code` - The verification or authentication code to be sent (commonly used in OTP scenarios)
3. `templateId` - The SMS template identifier used by the SMS service provider for message formatting

This DTO is positioned in the third-party-api module, suggesting it's part of an API contract layer that defines the interface for external service integrations. The high importance score (0.80) indicates this is a critical component in the SMS notification/verification workflow of the system.
responsibilities: Encapsulate SMS sending request parameters for data transfer between service layers
Define the data contract for third-party SMS service integration
Provide a type-safe structure for phone number, verification code, and template information

interfaces.name: SendSMSRequest
interfaces.description: DTO class for SMS sending request with auto-generated accessors via Lombok @Data annotation
